nasb.text: So the sons of Dan went on their way; and when Micah saw that they were too strong for him, he turned and went back to his house.

esv.text: Then the people of Dan went their way. And when Micah saw that they were too strong for him, he turned and went back to his home.

cnv.text: 但人繼續走他們的路；米迦見他們比自己強，就轉身回自己的家去了。

ccb.text: 但支派的人继续赶路。米迦见对方人多势众，就回家去了。
